subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Dr. Esslemont et al, spoken on 1920-01-02
subcodes.first_line: No. That gives the wrong idea. In the Cause of Baha'u'llah there is the House of Justice. Political affairs are not explicitly settled in the Tablets
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir], @law of obligatory prayer
